sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: UPS는 4분기 매출 245억 달러를 기록했으며, 2026년을 전략적 성장의 변곡점으로 제시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 연결 매출 245억 달러를 기록했으며, 조정 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.38달러를 달성했습니다.
2025년 연간 기준 85억 달러의 영업 현금흐름을 창출하고, 배당 및 자사주 매입을 통해 64억 달러를 주주에게 환원했습니다.

businessChanges.text: MD-11 항공기 기단 퇴역을 완료하여 기단 현대화 계획을 가속화했습니다.
미국 부문은 물량 감소로 매출이 3.2% 하락했으나, 개당 매출은 8.3% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 연결 영업이익은 26억 달러, 조정 영업이익은 29억 달러를 기록했습니다.
2025년 연간 매출은 887억 달러, 조정 영업이익은 87억 달러로 집계되었습니다.
국제 부문 매출은 개당 매출 7.1% 증가에 힘입어 전년 대비 2.5% 성장했습니다.

watchItems.text: 아마존 물량 감소(glide-down) 완료 이후 2026년 경영진이 언급한 수익성 개선 및 성장 전략의 구체적 실행 여부.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-earningspressre.htm EX-99.1 - PRESS RELEASE FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS Document Exhibit 99.1 UPS RELEASES 4Q 2025 EARNINGS AND PROVIDES 2026 GUIDANCE • Consolidated Revenues of $24.5B • Consolidated Operating Margin of 10.5%; Non-GAAP Adjusted * Consolidated Operating Margin of 11.8% • Diluted EPS of $2.10; Non-GAAP Adj. Diluted EPS of $2.38 • Declares a Quarterly Dividend of $1.64 ATLANTA – January 27, 2026 – UPS (NYSE:UPS) today announced fourth-quarter 2025 consolidated revenues of $24.5 billion. Consolidated operating profit was $2.6 billion; non-GAAP adjusted consolidated operating profit was $2.9 billion. Diluted earnings per share were $2.10 for the quarter; non-GAAP adjusted diluted earnings per share were $2.38.   Normalized numeric aliases: $24.5 billion = 245억 달러; $2.6 billion = 26억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $238 million = 2억 3,800만 달러; $24.5 = 24.5달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $2.38 = 2.38달러; $1.64 = 1.64달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러; $238 = 238달러; $0.28 = 0.28달러.

ge of $137 million due to a write-off of the company’s MD-11 aircraft fleet and after-tax transformation charges of $101 million. Regarding the MD-11 aircraft, UPS accelerated its fleet modernization plans, completing the retirement of its MD-11 fleet during the fourth quarter of 2025. “I want to thank UPSers across the globe for their tireless commitment to serving our customers as we delivered best-in-class service during peak for the eighth year in a row and outperformed our financial expectations in the fourth quarter,” said Carol Tomé, UPS chief executive officer. “2025 was a year of considerable progress for UPS as we took action to strengthen our revenue quality and build a more agile network. Looking ahead, upon completion of the Amazon glide-down, 2026 will be an inflection point in the execution of our strategy to deliver growth and sustained margin expansion." U.S  Normalized numeric aliases: $137 million = 1억 3,700만 달러; $101 million = 1억 100만 달러; $137 = 137달러; $101 = 101달러.

Revenue per piece grew by 8.3%. • Operating margin was 8.5%; non-GAAP adjusted operating margin was 10.2%. ent under ASC Topic 280 – Segment Reporting. • Revenue declined 12.7%, primarily due to a decline in volume in the Mail Innovations business. • Operating margin was 9.8%; non-GAAP adjusted operating margin was 10.3%. Full-Year 2025 Consolidated Results • Revenue was $88.7 billion. • Operating profit was $7.9 billion; non-GAAP adjusted operating profit was $8.7 billion. • Operating margin was 8.9%; non-GAAP adjusted operating margin was 9.8%. • Diluted EPS totaled $6.56; non-GAAP adjusted diluted EPS of $7.16. • Cash from operations was $8.5 billion and non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow was $5.5 billion. In addition, the company returned $6.4 billion of cash to shareowners through dividends and share rep  Normalized numeric aliases: $88.7 billion = 887억 달러; $7.9 billion = 79억 달러; $8.7 billion = 87억 달러; $8.5 billion = 85억 달러; $5.5 billion = 55억 달러; $6.4 billion = 64억 달러; $88.7 = 88.7달러; $7.9 = 7.9달러; $6.56 = 6.56달러; $1.64 = 1.64달러; $7.16 = 7.16달러; $8.5 = 8.5달러; $5.5 = 5.5달러; $6.4 = 6.4달러.
